BatchGetMemberAccountDetails.description: Grants permission to get member account details in batch

CancelMembership.description: Grants permission to cancel a membership

CloseCase.description: Grants permission to close a case

CreateCase.description: Grants permission to create a case

CreateCaseComment.description: Grants permission to create a case comment

CreateMembership.description: Grants permission to create a membership

GetCase.description: Grants permission to get a case

GetCaseAttachmentDownloadUrl.description: Grants permission to get a case attachment download URL

GetCaseAttachmentUploadUrl.description: Grants permission to get a case attachment upload URL

GetMembership.description: Grants permission to get a membership

ListCaseEdits.description: Grants permission to list case edits

ListComments.description: Grants permission to list case comments

ListInvestigations.description: Grants permission to list investigations for a case

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags attached to the specified resource

SendFeedback.description: Grants permission to send feedback for investigation results

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to the specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from the specified resource

UpdateCase.description: Grants permission to update a case

UpdateCaseComment.description: Grants permission to update a case comment

UpdateCaseStatus.description: Grants permission to update a case status

UpdateResolverType.description: Grants permission to update case resolver type

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
